case_title: CHEE YONG TAN VS. MICKEY SMEDLEY et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 301, DEMURRER -DEFENDANT AND DEMURRING PARTY MICKEY SMEDLEY WAS PRESENT IN PROPRIA PERSONA. THERE WERE NO OTHER APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED AS THE ORDER OF THE COURT: DEFENDANT MICKEY SMEDLEY'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND -- NO OPPOSITION FILED. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE, REPORTER: ERIC THRONE, CSR # 7855
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-06-2002 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAN, CHEE YONG AKA DANIEL TAN AS TO DEFENDANT SMEDLEY, MICKEY DOES 1 TO 3 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DEMURRER, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT SMEDLEY, MICKEY HEARING SET FOR MAY-06-2002 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

calendar.matters:
DEMURRER
Off Calendar May-06-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendant and demurring party Mickey Smedley was present in propria persona. There were no appearances. The tentative ruling was adopted as the order of the court: Defendant MICKEY SMEDLEY's demurrer is sustained without leave to amend -- no opposition filed. (JJM) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR # 7855
